evidence: "I LOVE this movie! Kids and family of all ages."
"Cult Classic. Horror fan, so I added it to my collection."
"It's about two people who couldn't be more wrong for one another... It's very cute; typical rom-com."
"It's not that easy. It shows true love."
"It has some sad parts, but in my opinion it's not too horrible for kids."
"If you enjoy horror films and have yet to see this one, I highly recommend!"
"I would say I loved the first one, and I thought the second one was just as good."
"If you have the opportunity, I'd recommend Bluray."
"I am a fan of Paul Walker, especially more so since he has passed."
"I grew up with the Lost Boys, but had no clue there were two other films made."
"I LOVE this movie!!! It has been added to my collection as yet another one of my favorite Disney movies."

summary: The user enjoys family-friendly films, comedies, and horror movies, often expressing strong emotional connections to the content. They prefer straightforward narratives with fast pacing and show a moderate sensitivity to production quality, but exhibit low brand loyalty to specific creators.
